hero.title: I ship systems that {highlight} end to end.
hero.subtitle: 5+ years delivering complete platforms - from automotive telemetry to SaaS. Where every detail matters, even those the user doesn't see.

about.label: // Who I am
about.heading: Bernardo {highlight}
about.bio_1: Full stack developer from Florianópolis, pursuing a degree in Computer Science at UFSC. I started in a software house building ERPs and multi-tenant systems, evolved to freelance delivering end-to-end platforms, and today I contribute to applied research at LISHA/UFSC in partnership with Renault.
about.bio_2: I move between backend and frontend with the same fluency — {highlight}. I design the architecture, implement the API, build the interface, and configure the deployment. Every project here reflects this complete vision.
about.bio_highlight: from the API architecture to the pixel on screen

d3t.role: Full stack dev - D3T Softwares Personalizados
d3t.desc: Software house. ERPs, multi-tenant systems, interactive odontogram. First contact with complex projects in production.

freelance.desc: EdTech platforms, clinical SaaS, payment gateway integration. Total responsibility: architecture, code, deployment.

ufsc.desc: Automotive telemetry, Edge-to-Cloud pipeline, MQTT, CI/CD. Bridge between academia and industry.
